Val cuts a single watermelon into 40 slices, and each slice has 20 black seeds and 20 white seeds. The total number of seeds in a watermelon tongue.  
Each slice contains 40 seeds, and there are 40 slices in total. The total number of seeds in a watermelon tongue.  
Multiplying 40 slices by 40 seeds per slice gives 1600 seeds. The total number of seeds in a watermelon tongue.
